title: cortex.health.<scope>.v1 data payload
description: Service health heartbeat payload. Emitted periodically by every CortexOS service so the dashboard and alert plugin can detect degradation or outages. Wrapped in the CloudEvents 1.0 envelope (see cloudevents-base.json).

service.description: Logical service name (e.g. cortex-consumer, paperclip-bridge, agentgateway).

status.description: Coarse health state. 'degraded' means partial functionality; 'down' means the service is failing readiness.

version.description: Service version (semver, git SHA, or image tag).

uptime_sec.description: Seconds since the service process started.

subject.description: NATS subject this heartbeat was published on.

ts.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the heartbeat was produced.

details.description: Free-form service-specific diagnostic detail (queue depths, last error, dependency status, etc.).
